prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: SON-ASRO-4WICK-CANDLE-AMZN Product Type: CANDLE Brand (from catalog): ASR Outdoor Existing Title: ASR Outdoor 48 Hour Survival Candle for Camping Emergency Fire Starter in Tin, 4 Wick Description: Need a dependable source of light when hiking, camping or backpacking, or when unforeseen disaster strikes? Did the batteries in your emergency home flashlight just fail during an unforeseen blackout or power outage? Need a last-resort fire starter in your camping gear? The solution is an easy one: the ASR Outdoor 4 Wick 48-Hour Survival Candle

Packed in a portable convenient tin box, this emergency light candle is compact, lightweight and fits easily in a backpack, bag or toolbox, making it a welcome addition to your tool kit or survival kit as a light source or candle warmer.

Best of all, it's ready to go whenever you need it. The candle's four wick sections, each with 12 hours of burn time can be burned all together for greater brightness or one at a time, providing a total 48 hours of outdoor light using soy and regular wax. Batteries for flashlights and modern lanterns aren't reliable, while the survival candle offers a dependable emergency light source in any situation, so you'll never get caught in the dark.

Sometimes the simplest solutions are the best, and you'll appreciate the basic dependability of this prepper survival candle. It's comforting to know that in an emergency or disaster situation, you won't have to work at gadgetry or master a complicated learning curve. When you're ready for easy indoor or outdoor lighting, whether it's a blackout or back-country wilderness trip, the ASR Outdoor Survival Candle will provide light and warmth when you need it most. Search Terms: power outage long lasting survival candle jute wax bug out bag wilderness prepper home security hurricane storm emergency soywax tin can 36 hour clear suvivial small white Features: - INSTANT EMERGENCY LIGHT: Whether you're hiking, camping or backpacking into the great outdoors, putting together an earthquake survival kit or struck with a blackout power outage at home, the ASR Outdoor 48-hour survival emergency light wax candle provides indoor or outdoor lighting to keep you and your family safe - 48 HOUR BURN TIME: The candle's four wick sections each have 12 hours of burn time; They can be burned all together or one at a time, providing a total 48 hours of light, using soy and regular wax; Batteries in flashlights and lanterns are expensive and can fail, while the survival candle offers a dependable indoor outdoor lighting source in any situation and can be used as a candle warmer too - COMPACT LIGHTWEIGHT & PORTABLE: The 4-wick wax candle is poured in a durable tin box with lid to keep the candle in good condition; the emergency light candle fits in the palm of your hand, making it easy to pack in a bug out bag, with your camping gear or in a trekking backpack; a must-have item in any survival kit! - SURVIVAL FIRE STARTER: If you have matches on hand, this 4-wick wax candle may come in handy as a fire starter if igniting your kindling is proving troublesome; with 48 hours of burning time, getting a roaring fire started at your campsite or emergency fire in the wilderness - SPECIFICATIONS: Dimensions: 2.75 x 3.13 x 2.75 inches; Surface Material: Soy wax; Main Material: Plain wax; Wax Weight: 7oz (200 GM); Color: Silver, White; Total Burn Time: 48 hours; Candle is unscented === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Provide a title for the item that may be customer facing === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}

anthropic.item_name: ASR Outdoor 4-Wick 48 Hour Survival Candle Tin

anthropic.title_differentiation: 48 Hour Burn Time, Emergency Light, Camping And Blackout Power Outage, Portable Tin, Fire Starter
